_comment: routesLayerUrl/waypointsLayerUrl are queried directly (preferred) -- these are hosted-service URLs, not dependent on the layer being added to the webmap. routesLayerTitle/waypointsLayerTitle are only used as a fallback (matched against operational layer titles in the map, case-insensitive) if the corresponding *LayerUrl is left blank.
_comment_kissPointValues: kisspoint field values (case-insensitive) that count as a Vehicle Swap / Kiss Point. Anything else (including blank/No/0) counts as false.
_comment_kissPointWrite: Exact string written to the kisspoint field when adding a new waypoint via the Add Waypoint tool.
_comment_depArrTypes: type field values (case-insensitive) selectable as Departure/Arrival endpoints. All other waypoints are pass-through stops only, auto-detected along the route.
_comment_basemap: The widget renders its own embedded Leaflet map (independent of the app's ArcGIS Map) for speed. Points to public OpenStreetMap tiles by default -- if this Enterprise network can't reach that, swap in an internal/offline tile server URL template here.
